summary: Frontend testing for Learn page bug fixes. Verified: (1) Support service modal title fix - code correctly shows service.title instead of generic 'Request Training' via modalContext state, (2) Breed Spotlight shows Indie-specific facts, (3) Weather tip shows live temperature (31°) with pet name 'Mojo', (4) Learn for Mojo tips expand inline with advice, (5) Products & Services sections use lucide-react icons (no emojis), (6) Guided Learning Paths badge uses pink gradient (from-pink-500 to-rose-500), (7) Daily Learning Tip banner visible, (8) Curated Bundles has 3 learn bundles in static config.

test_results.shows_mojo_personalization: PASSED - Shows 'Learning with Mojo' and personalized content
test_results.shows_indie_breed: PASSED - Breed Indie displayed in personalized sections
test_results.breed_spotlight: PASSED - Shows Indie breed fact: 'Indies are one of the oldest dog breeds, naturally evolved for India's climate'
test_results.weather_tip: PASSED - Shows live temperature '31°' and advice mentioning Mojo's paws
test_results.tips_expand_inline: PASSED - Tips expand with 'Mira's Advice for Mojo' inline (not opening modal)
test_results.daily_learning_tip: PASSED - TODAY'S LEARNING TIP banner visible with training advice
test_results.guided_paths_pink_badge: CODE VERIFIED - Badge uses 'bg-gradient-to-r from-pink-500 to-rose-500' (NOT blue)
test_results.products_section_icons: PASSED - Uses lucide-react icons (PawPrint, Target, Sparkles, Heart, MapPin, Shield)
test_results.services_section_icons: PASSED - Uses lucide-react icons (Target, Sparkles, Brain, PawPrint)
test_results.support_for_pet_icons: CODE VERIFIED - SupportForPet.jsx uses lucide-react icons (Brain, Target, Sparkles, Salad, Activity, Heart, PawPrint, Stethoscope, Dumbbell, Home, GraduationCap, HandHeart)
test_results.support_modal_title_fix: CODE VERIFIED - modalContext state passes service.title to dialog (line 983: setModalContext({ title: service.title }), line 1037: modalContext.title shown in DialogTitle)
test_results.curated_bundles_count: CODE VERIFIED - 3 learn bundles defined (Training Success, Puppy Learning Starter, Mental Enrichment)
test_results.topic_modal_opens: PASSED - Clicking topic box opens LearnTopicModal
test_results.12_topic_boxes: PASSED - All 12 topics visible (Puppy Basics, Breed Guides, Food & Feeding, Grooming, Behavior, Training Basics, Travel with Dogs, Senior Dog Care, Health Basics, Rescue/Indie Care, Seasonal Care, New Pet Parent Guide)

modal_title_fix.lines: Line 118: modalContext state, Line 983: setModalContext({ title: service.title }), Line 1037: {modalContext ? modalContext.title : 'Request Training'}

lucide_icons_support.lines: Lines 14: imports from lucide-react, Lines 24-50: All service configs use icon: Stethoscope, Target, etc.

pink_badge_guided_paths.line: Line 771: className='inline-flex items-center gap-2 bg-gradient-to-r from-pink-500 to-rose-500'

critical_code_review_comments: React key warning: 'Each child in a list should have a unique key prop' in PetHomePage - minor, should be fixed
Duplicate key warning for '/learn' route - should investigate nav configuration
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Learn page bug fixes verified. Support modal title fix confirmed via code review - modalContext state correctly passes service.title to dialog. Breed Spotlight shows Indie facts. Weather tip shows 31° with Mojo mentioned. All icons are lucide-react (no emojis). Guided paths badge is pink gradient. Learn for Mojo tips expand inline with Mira's Advice.
